title.en: Qinglong liquid is indeed precious, but it is n...

content.en:
Qinglong liquid is indeed precious, but it is not 100% to help a fifth-stage Great Ancestor to impact the Heavenly Ancestor, if it is really 100%, the number of Heavenly Ancestors will not be so rare.

Moreover, a resource like Aotaki Liquid can only help once, and once it fails, there is no way to use Aotaki Liquid to impact the Heavenly Ancestor again, and it may even cause some damage to the foundation.

But even so, countless fifth-stage great ancestors were eager to obtain resources like the Qinglong liquid.

However, in addition to the formula, Aotaki Liquid also needs a lot of resources, among which Tongtian Zhenjin needs a lot, unless it is a top power, it really can't make up the material resources needed to refine Aotaki Liquid.

Ye Tian was able to take out a Qinglong liquid this time, and the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was naturally a little surprised.

In terms of value, the value of Aotaki liquid can be higher than that of the True Dragon Realm Ruins Stone.

However, he didn't lose much in exchange for a few True Dragon Realm Ruins on the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor's body in exchange for a portion of Qinglong liquid.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor officially traded, and both parties were satisfied.

In this way, Ye Tian gathered the last material for cultivating the Extreme Technique.

In other words, he can now go and practice the Extreme Technique!

"The Extreme Technique is dangerous, but it's nothing to me, but every time I fail, I will lose a material, so I have to be careful and careful!" Ye Tian muttered.

Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the Extreme Technique here, preparing the materials one by one.

At the same time, there are other replica bodies here, and once one of the replica bodies falls, the other replica bodies continue to cultivate the Extreme Technique.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian refined all kinds of materials into his immeasurable bones, and immediately cultivated the Extreme Technique.

Rumble!!!!

An incomparably terrifying force seemed to compress his flesh and blood, and if an outsider was present, he would find that his current flesh and blood body was instantly weakened to a small point, and then immeasurably shrunk.

Time and space are endlessly compressed, turning into a pole at the end of time and space.

And the same is true of Ye Tian's flesh and blood body, if the flesh and blood body is not strong enough, as long as he cultivates the extreme technique, it will instantly turn into powder.

But even so, Ye Tian was still under unimaginable pressure, and his flesh and blood were constantly crumbling.

A certain moment.

Ye Tian was a little sluggish when he was cultivating the Extreme Technique, which directly led to complete collapse.

The surrounding time and space were annihilated together with Ye Tian's body, which meant that this cultivation had failed.

"The Extreme Technique is really extremely difficult to cultivate, and it takes a lot of luck to succeed in cultivating at one time. It's no wonder that a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor like the True Night Great Ancestor didn't dare to cultivate, if he really cultivated, there was a high probability that he would fall!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

I don't know who created such an immeasurable magic technique, and the cultivation difficulty is so great!

"Keep cultivating!"

Ye Tian started his second cultivation, but this time he was still almost successful.

Fortunately, the materials he prepared were quite sufficient, so he carried out his third cultivation.

Time flies, and in the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of realms have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already passed the most dangerous period, and he only needed to cultivate step by step in the future, and he could successfully breed the Extreme Technique Imprint, and then evolve it and turn it into a real immeasurable magic technique.

Another long time has passed.

The Mark of the Pole has finally appeared.

"It's done!"

Immediately, he continued to devour all kinds of resources to help the Pole Technique Imprint form the Pole Technique Immeasurable Divine Power.

After spending a huge amount of resources, the Extreme Technique was completely practiced by him.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's physical body began to transform, and although this ascension was not as good as breaking through to the Boundary-Breaking Level in the fifth stage of the Invincible Level, it was also a huge transformation.

Once the transformation is complete, his strength will be much stronger than it is now.

After a long time, the transformation was completely completed.

"The flesh and blood body is much stronger than before, and the key is that the attack power of the Extreme Technique is the first place on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers!"

Ye Tian was going to use his copy body to try it out to see how powerful the Extreme Technique was.

Immeasurable Ruins.

The two figures came here, and they were all copies of Ye Tian's body.

One of Ye Tian's copied bodies turned on the immeasurable magic skills such as the Infinite Feather Armor, and also displayed the ten-armed golden body, which was combined with the Heaven Slaying Blade to deal with the extreme technique.

The other replicates the body and only performs the Extreme Technique.

"Extreme Technique!"

Ye Tian pointed casually, and a little aurora hole passed through.

The speed of this blow was too fast, and the Sky Slayer Blade couldn't intercept it at all.

Burst!

The ten-armed golden body was directly broken, and the top-notch immeasurable supernatural power such as the Infinite Feather Armor was also useless, shattered like a layer of paper.

The flesh and blood of the replicated body was directly pierced by a single blow.

"Hurt! And not lightly!"

Then the two replica bodies fought together, but the duplicate body that did not perform the Pole Technique did not last long, and was killed by the Pole Technique many times.

"There is a big gap in strength between those who have the pole technique and those who don't use the pole technique. Moreover, my current physical body is definitely at the top among the Fifth Stage Ancestors of the Boundary Breaking Level, and with the Extreme Technique, it should be enough to easily crush the other Fifth Stage Ancestors of the Boundary Breaking Level!" Ye Tian thought.

At this time, he really didn't need to be afraid of some Heavenly Ancestors.

Of course, if he faced a Heavenly Ancestor like Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, his strength was still not enough!

"My current strength is already at the top of the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Rank Great Ancestor, although I can improve my strength a little in the future, I need to cultivate a kind of immeasurable supernatural power on the immeasurable supernatural power list, or I can directly choose to impact the Heavenly Ancestor realm!"

However, if the fifth-stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary-Breaking Level wants to attack the Heavenly Ancestor, resources like Qinglong Liquid are useless, which makes those Boundary-Breaking Fifth-Stage Great Ancestors have no resources available, and can only rely on themselves.

In the fifth stage, if the Great Ancestor wants to break through to the Heavenly Ancestor, it is still related to the Infinite Divine Powers.

The power of the Infinite Divine Power comes from the Infinite Bone, and if you want to become a Heavenly Ancestor, you need to spread this power all over your body, so that the flesh and blood body can become the source of the power of the Infinite Divine Power, and it will be perfectly integrated with the flesh and blood body, thus triggering the ultimate transformation of the flesh and blood body.

At that time, the Skill of Immeasurable Divine Power does not need to be urged, and a casual blow will be the power of the Skill of Immeasurable Divine Power of One Gate, and its power is far from being comparable to that of the fifth stage.

However, the more powerful the immeasurable supernatural power technique is, if it wants to spread all over the body and fuse with the flesh and blood body almost perfectly, the difficulty can be imagined.

Especially for those immeasurable supernatural skills on the immeasurable supernatural power list, it is even more difficult to fuse flesh and blood.

This is also the reason why the True Night Ancestor has not broken through yet, but once they break through, the increase in strength will be extremely terrifying, and it may be comparable to Heavenly Ancestors like Dongao Heavenly Ancestor.

Ye Tian has only been a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor for a long time now, so he is not qualified to attack the Heavenly Ancestor in a short period of time, so he can only take his time.
